carts.name: Turbo
carts.description:
Seating & Design

4-passenger capacity with forward-facing bench seating
Spacious cabin with generous legroom for all passengers
Comfortable seating with durable, weather-resistant upholstery
Full-coverage roof protecting all four passengers
Wide body construction for stability and passenger comfort

Performance

Powerful electric motor providing strong acceleration for four passengers
Top speed up to ~23 mph with full passenger load
Enhanced grade-climbing ability up to ~25% for hilly terrain
Heavy-duty suspension system designed for smooth rides on varied surfaces

Handles moderate inclines and flat terrain with consistent power delivery
Responsive handling and a tight turning radius for navigating

Climbs grades up to ~30% for hills and uneven terrain
Heavy-duty suspension and lifted chassis for improved

carts.name: Apollo 4+2
carts.description:
The DACH Apollo 4+2 is a premium, automotive-inspired 72V lithium Low-Speed Vehicle (LSV) designed to deliver a luxury driving experience far beyond a traditional golf cart. Built on a unibody monocoque chassis, the Apollo combines durability, performance, and high-end technology into a sleek, modern platform.

This model features a 4-forward-facing seat layout with a convertible rear seat (4+2 configuration), allowing it to function as both a passenger vehicle and a utility cart—perfect for beach communities, campgrounds, resorts, and neighborhood driving.

With advanced features like cruise
